title: Intent
description: First-pass interpretation of a user prompt into structured edit intent. Drives every downstream stage: edit_type picks priors, tone_vector picks template + color, speakers seed dialogue search, target_duration_sec drives arc-length math. Produced before any audio analysis or ingest, so the rest of the pipeline can plan around it.

prompt_text.description: The original prompt the user supplied. Stored verbatim for re-classification when the classifier is updated.

edit_type.description: Resolved edit type from the existing 8-type taxonomy plus the new dialogue_narrative + dance_movement + sad_emotional types added in v2.

tone_vector.description: 8-dim emotional tone target. Order: [grief, triumph, fear, awe, tension, release, sorrow, elation]. Each 0-1.

speakers.description: Named characters / speakers referenced in the prompt or implied by the source list. Used by the dialogue-narrative pipeline to seed dialogue search.

evidence.description: Short note on how this speaker was inferred (prompt mention / source filename / fandom roster).

auto_template.description: Recommended template id (matches one of edit-types.json templates) or 'custom' if no preset matches well.

target_duration_sec.description: How long the final edit should run. Parsed from prompt ('30 seconds', 'full song', '2 minutes') or defaults to the song duration.

duration_source.description: Where the target duration came from.

fandoms.description: Fandom families involved (anime, marvel, mcu, etc.). Used for fandom-balance + per-bucket prior selection.

confidence.description: Overall classifier confidence. Below 0.5 → engine should ask the user to confirm.

needs_user_confirmation.description: True if confidence is low enough that the engine should pause and confirm with the user before proceeding.
